# Nepal Fillings

> Nepal Fillings is Nepal's all-in-one digital marketing platform. Send bulk Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram and Messenger campaigns from a single dashboard with credit-based pricing and no monthly fees. Built for Nepali businesses, NEPSE traders, e-commerce stores, and marketing agencies.

Operated by Marketminds Investment Group Pvt Ltd, based in Kathmandu, Nepal.

## Core capabilities

- Bulk email campaigns (transactional + marketing) via SendGrid and self-hosted Listmonk
- Bulk SMS in Nepal via Aakash SMS gateway integration
- WhatsApp Business API broadcasts
- Telegram channel and group broadcasts
- Facebook Messenger marketing automation
- Subscriber lists, segmentation, and contact management
- Campaign analytics and deliverability reporting
- Credit-based pay-as-you-go billing (no monthly fees)

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://nepalfillings.com): Product overview and feature tour
- [Pricing](https://nepalfillings.com/front-pages/pricing): Credit-based pricing for Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram, Messenger
- [Help Center](https://nepalfillings.com/front-pages/help-center): Setup guides, FAQs, troubleshooting
- [Blog index](https://nepalfillings.com/blog): Articles on digital marketing in Nepal
- [Privacy Policy](https://nepalfillings.com/front-pages/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://nepalfillings.com/front-pages/terms)

## Sitemaps

- [Main sitemap](https://nepalfillings.com/sitemap.xml): All static pages and published blog posts
- [Blog sitemap with images](https://nepalfillings.com/api/public/blog/sitemap.xml): Blog posts with featured-image metadata

## Public APIs (read-only, no auth required)

- `GET https://nepalfillings.com/api/public/blog/posts` — Paginated list of published blog posts (JSON)
- `GET https://nepalfillings.com/api/public/blog/posts/{slug}` — Single post detail
- `GET https://nepalfillings.com/api/v1/health` — Service health check

## Editorial focus

The blog publishes daily articles tailored to the Nepal market, covering:

- Email marketing strategies and deliverability for Nepali audiences
- Bulk SMS campaign tactics and Aakash SMS integration patterns
- WhatsApp Business API for SMEs in Nepal
- Telegram group marketing and engagement measurement
- Messenger and chatbot automation for Nepali e-commerce
- Comparative guides (Email vs SMS, WhatsApp vs Viber, etc.)

- [Search Console verification](https://nepalfillings.com/google16932f9bf54e4b87.html)
- [Robots policy](https://nepalfillings.com/robots.txt)
